expectations.evidence: Response explicitly recommends yappi multiple times
Response mentions cpu clock type: yappi.set_clock_type("cpu")

expectations.text: Recommends yappi with cpu clock for CPU-bound synchronous work, or mentions py-spy/scalene as alternatives for line-level profiling
expectations.evidence: Recommends yappi with cpu clock mode, and mentions py-spy and scalene as alternatives for line-level profiling

expectations.text: Distinguishes between cpu clock (measures actual CPU time, ignoring I/O wait) and wall clock, explaining why cpu clock is appropriate for CPU-bound work
expectations.evidence: Explains 'cpu = measures actual compute time, ignores I/O wait' and elaborates 'it measures only time spent on CPU, so I/O-waiting time (file reads, memory allocation pauses) doesn't inflate your numbers'
